title: Demand realization leaked into advance inventory placement
prompt: Before a weekend, a depot allocates fixed inventory across service zones using a joint demand distribution. A proposed account says the manager observes each zone's weekend demand and then makes the initial allocation, although no post-demand transfer or recourse exists. Diagnose the unavailable-information error and restore the ex ante allocation problem.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: minimize expected shortage and leftover cost
decision_variables: advance inventory allocated to each service zone
model_specification.mechanism: Inventory positioned before the weekend determines which realized zone demand can be served after uncertainty resolves.

fidelity_requirements: No transfer or recourse follows demand
prohibited_inferences: The depot observes weekend demand before allocating
Inventory is rebalanced after demand realizes

evidence_needs.claim: The joint distribution represents weekend demand
